description: A 56-bp synthetic constitutive/IPTG-regulatable promoter combining the phage T7 A1 (PA1) core with two natural lac O1 operators placed at positions 4 (spacer) and 3 (downstream).

references.title: Promoters largely determine the efficiency of repressor action
Independent and tight regulation of transcriptional units in Escherichia coli via the LacR/O, the TetR/O and AraC/I1-I2 regulatory elements
The nucleotide sequence of the lac operator

label: PA1/O4/O3
note: A 56-bp synthetic constitutive/IPTG-regulatable promoter combining the phage T7 A1 (PA1) core with two natural lac O1 operators placed at positions 4 (spacer) and 3 (downstream).
Native phage T7 A1 -35 hexamer (TTGACT) at the 5' end of the part; differs from the sigma-70 consensus TTGACA only at the final base.

label: lac operator O4
note: Natural lac O1 core (5'-TGTGAGCGGATAACAAT) inserted into the -35/-10 spacer; this is the upstream spacer-embedded operator (Lanzer & Bujard position 4, 'O4';...
Native phage T7 A1 -10 hexamer (GATACT) immediately downstream of the spacer-embedded O4 operator; conserved TA dinucleotide shifted relative to consensus TA...

label: lac operator O3
note: Second exact copy of the natural lac O1 core at the 3' end, downstream of the -10 (Lanzer & Bujard position 3, 'O3'; Lutz & Bujard position III).

functional_claims.label: LacI-repressible / IPTG-inducible (T7 A1 core with two lac O1 operators).

source.quote: A 56-bp synthetic constitutive/IPTG-regulatable promoter combining the phage T7 A1 (PA1) core with two natural lac O1 operators placed at positions 4 (spacer) and 3 (downstream).
